message:
fix(codegen+runtime): Handle i128 to UnifiedInt conversion in reassignment

When a UnifiedInt variable is reassigned with an i128 expression
(e.g., from binop involving sys.maxsize), wrap with UnifiedInt.fromI128().

Added:
- UnifiedInt.fromI128() method that auto-demotes to i64 if value fits
- Detection of binop expressions involving attribute access (sys.maxsize)
- Proper wrapping in reassignment path
